title: psila trinervis
intro: Psila trinervis, also known as the "Beech drops" plant, is a flowering plant species in the family Primulaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Psila trinervis is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds. The herbal preparations of Psila trinervis include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be made by steeping the leaves or flowers in hot water.
